mapper.sql: select a.purchase_order_id, a.order_no, a.supplier_id, a.purchase_date, a.total_amount, ifnull(item_summary.total_quantity, 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(inbound_summary.inbound_count, 0) as inbound_count, ifnull(inbound_summary.inbound_quantity, 0) as inbound_quantity, greatest( ifnull(item_summary.total_quantity, 0) - ifnull(inbound_summary.inbound_quantity, 0), 0 ) as remain_quantity, a.status, a.remark, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time from wms_purchase_order a left join ( select purchase_order_id, sum(quantity) as total_quantity from wms_purchase_order_item group by purchase_order_id ) item_summary on item_summary.purchase_order_id = a.purchase_order_id left join ( select purchase_order_id, count(1) as inbound_count, sum(total_qty) as inbound_quantity from wms_inbound where status = 'audited' group by purchase_order_id ) inbound_summary on inbound_summary.purchase_order_id = a.purchase_order_id
mapper.select: select a.purchase_order_id, a.order_no, a.supplier_id, a.purchase_date, a.total_amount, ifnull(item_summary.total_quantity, 0) as total_quantity, ifnull(inbound_summary.inbound_count, 0) as inbound_count, ifnull(inbound_summary.inbound_quantity, 0) as inbound_quantity, greatest( ifnull(item_summary.total_quantity, 0) - ifnull(inbound_summary.inbound_quantity, 0), 0 ) as remain_quantity, a.status, a.remark, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, b.purchase_order_item_id as sub_purchase_order_item_id, b.purchase_order_id as sub_purchase_order_id, b.product_id as sub_product_id, b.quantity as sub_quantity, b.price as sub_price, b.amount as sub_amount, ifnull(linked_inbound_item_summary.inbound_quantity, 0) + ifnull(fallback_inbound_item_summary.inbound_quantity, 0) as sub_inbound_quantity, greatest( ifnull(b.quantity, 0) - ifnull(linked_inbound_item_summary.inbound_quantity, 0) - ifnull(fallback_inbound_item_summary.inbound_quantity, 0), 0 ) as sub_remain_quantity, b.remark as sub_remark from wms_purchase_order a left join ( select purchase_order_id, sum(quantity) as total_quantity from wms_purchase_order_item group by purchase_order_id ) item_summary on item_summary.purchase_order_id = a.purchase_order_id left join ( select purchase_order_id, count(1) as inbound_count, sum(total_qty) as inbound_quantity from wms_inbound where status = 'audited' group by purchase_order_id ) inbound_summary on inbound_summary.purchase_order_id = a.purchase_order_id left join wms_purchase_order_item b on b.purchase_order_id = a.purchase_order_id left join ( select inbound.purchase_order_id, inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id, sum(inbound_item.quantity) as inbound_quantity from wms_inbound_item inbound_item join wms_inbound inbound on inbound.inbound_id = inbound_item.inbound_id where inbound.status = 'audited' and inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id is not null group by inbound.purchase_order_id, inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id ) linked_inbound_item_summary on linked_inbound_item_summary.purchase_order_id = a.purchase_order_id and linked_inbound_item_summary.purchase_order_item_id = b.purchase_order_item_id left join ( select inbound.purchase_order_id, inbound_item.product_id, sum(inbound_item.quantity) as inbound_quantity from wms_inbound_item inbound_item join wms_inbound inbound on inbound.inbound_id = inbound_item.inbound_id where inbound.status = 'audited' and inbound_item.purchase_order_item_id is null group by inbound.purchase_order_id, inbound_item.product_id ) fallback_inbound_item_summary on fallback_inbound_item_summary.purchase_order_id = a.purchase_order_id and fallback_inbound_item_summary.product_id = b.product_id where a.purchase_order_id = #{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_purchase_order
order_no, supplier_id, purchase_date, total_amount, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{orderNo}, #{supplierId}, #{purchaseDate}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update: update wms_purchase_order set status = #{newStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where purchase_order_id = #{purchaseOrderId} and status in ('1', '2', '3')
mapper.delete:
delete from wms_purchase_order where purchase_order_id in
#{purchaseOrderId}

delete from wms_purchase_order_item where purchase_order_id in
#{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_purchase_order_item( purchase_order_item_id, purchase_order_id, product_id, quantity, price, amount, remark) values
( #{item.purchaseOrderItemId}, #{item.purchaseOrderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.price}, #{item.amount}, #{item.remark})
